raw_consumer_statement: My Citi credit card was fraudulently charged {$40.00} on XX/XX/25 at XXXX in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, {$740.00} at XXXX  in XXXX, XXXX, and {$1000.00} at XXXX XXXX in XXXX, XXXX. I live and work in XXXX, XXXX  and was nowhere near these places on XX/XX/25. I asked that these charges be removed and they were temporarily, but then they were put back on my card
